name: PAR PACIFIC HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Par Pacific Holdings, Inc., headquartered in Houston, Texas, is a growth-oriented energy company providing both renewable and conventional fuels to the western United States. The company's operations are organized into three primary segments: Refining (converting crude oil into gasoline, distillate, asphalt, and other products), Retail (operating fuel retail outlets and convenience stores under Hele and nomnom brands), and Logistics (an extensive multi-modal network for transporting petroleum and refined products).
sellsTo: Hawaii and areas ranging from Washington state to the Dakotas and Wyoming
military bases (e.g., Ellsworth Air Force Base, Joint Base Lewis McChord)

exposures.sentence: Par Pacific Holdings, Inc., headquartered in Houston, Texas, is a growth-oriented energy company providing both renewable and conventional fuels to the western United States.
The joint venture was formed for the development, construction, ownership, and operation of the renewable fuels manufacturing facility co-located with our Hawaii refinery.

catalysts.event: Renewable Fuels Facility expected to commence operations
catalysts.sentence: The Renewable Fuels Facility is expected to commence operations in the first half of 2026.
